---

Hey! No wrong questions here. Use this for anything that doesn't fit a bug report or feature request.

---

## What's this about?

- [ ] Gameplay — I'm stuck or something isn't working as I'd expect
- [ ] Commands — I'm not sure how to use a command or what it does
- [ ] Contributing — I want to help but not sure where to start
- [ ] Code of Conduct — I have a concern about community interaction
- [ ] Security — I want to discuss a potential issue privately (see `SECURITY.md` first)
- [ ] General — just a question or comment

---

## Your Question

Ask away. The more context the better, but don't worry about format.

---

## Anything Else?

Optional — version, browser, what you've already tried, or anything else that might help.

- Version (if relevant): `v5.x`
